title: Backend Engineer
blurb: Builds and operates server-side services, APIs, and databases. Owns reliability, data modeling, and performance of backend systems.

title: Frontend Engineer
blurb: Builds user-facing web interfaces. Owns component architecture, accessibility, and the rendering/performance of the client app.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
blurb: Designs, trains, and ships ML/LLM systems. Owns model selection, data pipelines, evaluation, and serving of models in production.

disqualifiers: only used ML APIs with no modeling understanding

title: Data Engineer
blurb: Builds data pipelines and warehouses. Owns ingestion, transformation (ETL/ELT), and the quality and availability of analytical data.
